arcs.description: Read the season flag; only an active season enables watering.
Read the current clock tick without consuming it.

description: A greenhouse waters a zone only during an active growing season and only while the clock is ticking. Both the season flag (with a predicate) and the clock tick are READ arcs: watering is gated on them but consumes neither, so many zones can be watered against the same season and tick.
name: greenhouse-sprinkler

places.description: Holds one season_flag token describing the current growing season.
places.name: season

transitions.description: Water one zone when the season is active.
transitions.name: water_zone
